# Mosaic Hostel Varanasi

> Mosaic Hostel is a budget backpacker hostel near Assi Ghat, Varanasi, India.
> Dorm beds start at Rs 499/night. Private rooms also available.
> Free WiFi, rooftop terrace, air conditioning, 24-hour reception, female-only dorms.
> Located at B1/85C, Assi Ghat Road, Near Mumukshu Bhawan, Varanasi 221005, India.
> Telephone: +91-9125492225

## About

- Check-in: 12:00 PM | Check-out: 11:00 AM
- Female-only and mixed dorms available
- 2-minute walk from Assi Ghat, River Ganges
- Near BHU and Kashi Vishwanath Temple
- Also known as Banaras and Kashi
